name: Midtrans
description: Indonesias largest payment gateway (part of GoTo/Gojek) — 25+ payment methods via API and ready-to-use plugins.

seo.title: Midtrans — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Midtrans: Indonesias largest payment gateway (part of GoTo/Gojek) — 25+ payment methods via API and ready-to-use plugins.

when_to_use: 25+ Indonesian payment method acceptance via Snap checkout widget
GoPay, OVO, Dana, and virtual account collection for Indonesian platforms
Recurring billing for Indonesian subscription services via GoTo payment rails
Marketplace split payments and commission management for Indonesian platforms

pros: Default gateway in Indonesia with 25+ methods
Broad coverage: cards, wallets, bank transfer, QRIS
review.verdict: Near-mandatory for Indonesian merchants — coverage breadth and GoTo ecosystem outweigh rough edges.
review.best_for: E-commerce and apps selling to Indonesian consumers

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
